How a billiard hall in Paris's Belleville neighborhood became a symbol of gentrification
subhed: Every evening, a new crowd of young creatives packs M8, a billiards hall with six tables located in Paris's 19th arrondissement. As those working in the luxury industry started coming, the venue's original regulars gradually faded away.

title: 'In 1979, the Iranian left played a major role in the rise of the Islamic Republic'
subhed: Philosopher Stéphanie Roza and political scientist Amirpasha Tavakkoli explain how, throughout the 20th century, the political turmoil in Iran, torn between modernity and anti-modernity, ultimately led to Islamist victory.

title: Citizen investigators dig into the Epstein files
subhed: Since the declassification of the Epstein files, countless internet users have been delving into this massive trove of emails, videos, official reports and personal diaries. This citizen investigation sometimes turns into obsession.
